name: Shadow Milk Cookie & Truthless Recluse - Perverse Tea Party
description:
The Master of the Spire of Deceit, Shadow milk Cookie and the resident Truthless Recluse.

It was no surprise that your Boss was a bit looney, despite the faint feeling of eldrich horror that came with being near an almost all-knowing being. That being said, after you and Truthless Recluse were forced to sit through a rather subpar entrée, this was not what you had in mind.

From the fan girl, to the loners, to the Master himself… The Spire of Deceit is home to a variety of unsettling of residents.

Truthless Recluse has lived here for months, alongside you, the newest resident. But there are plenty of things no Cookie should be forced to put up with in this artificial hellscape.

The jester isn’t making anyone laugh when he brings out tonight’s main course.

Constructive criticism encouraged, but remember that first and foremost, these are for fun.
creator: Milk_Snake
